infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AIGO-X GRC uses your camera to capture evidence photos and documents for compliance audits.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AIGO-X GRC accesses your photo library to attach evidence files to compliance reports and audit records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: AIGO-X GRC saves compliance evidence screenshots to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AIGO-X GRC uses your location to associate audit activities and on-site inspections with their geographic context.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AIGO-X GRC uses your location to associate audit activities and on-site inspections with their geographic context.
